=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToGen_anonymous.ts ---
// refactor: 5:44-5:45, 14:41-14:42
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

const asyncFunctionDeclaration = async funcpipe(t)ion() {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}

const asyncArrowFunctionExpression = async () => {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Rewrite to Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToGen_anonymous.ts ---
// refactor: 5:44-5:45, 14:41-14:42
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

const asyncFunctionDeclaration = function () {
    return Effect.gen(function* () {
        const response = yield* Effect.promise(() => fetch("test"));
        if (response.ok) {
            const y = yield* Effect.promise(() => response.json());
            return y;
        }
        return null;
    });
};

const asyncArrowFunctionExpression = async () => {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Rewrite to Effect.gen with failures" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToGen_anonymous.ts ---
// refactor: 5:44-5:45, 14:41-14:42
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

class Error1 extends Data.TaggedError("Error1")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

class Error2 extends Data.TaggedError("Error2")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

const asyncFunctionDeclaration = function () {
    return Effect.gen(function* () {
        const response = yield* Effect.tryPromise({ try: () => fetch("test"), catch: cause => new Error1({ cause }) });
        if (response.ok) {
            const y = yield* Effect.tryPromise({ try: () => response.json(), catch: cause => new Error2({ cause }) });
            return y;
        }
        return null;
    });
};

const asyncArrowFunctionExpression = async () => {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Rewrite to Effect.fn" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToGen_anonymous.ts ---
// refactor: 5:44-5:45, 14:41-14:42
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

const asyncFunctionDeclaration = Effect.fn("asyncFunctionDeclaration")(function* () {
    const response = yield* Effect.promise(() => fetch("test"));
    if (response.ok) {
        const y = yield* Effect.promise(() => response.json());
        return y;
    }
    return null;
});

const asyncArrowFunctionExpression = async () => {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}


=== [R1] Refactor 4: "Rewrite to Effect.fn with failures" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToGen_anonymous.ts ---
// refactor: 5:44-5:45, 14:41-14:42
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

class Error1 extends Data.TaggedError("Error1")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

class Error2 extends Data.TaggedError("Error2")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

const asyncFunctionDeclaration = Effect.fn("asyncFunctionDeclaration")(function* () {
    const response = yield* Effect.tryPromise({ try: () => fetch("test"), catch: cause => new Error1({ cause }) });
    if (response.ok) {
        const y = yield* Effect.tryPromise({ try: () => response.json(), catch: cause => new Error2({ cause }) });
        return y;
    }
    return null;
});

const asyncArrowFunctionExpression = async () => {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}


=== [R1] Refactor 5: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToGen_anonymous.ts ---
// refactor: 5:44-5:45, 14:41-14:42
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

const asyncFunctionDeclaration = async function(): Promise<any> {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}

const asyncArrowFunctionExpression = async () => {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}


=== [R2] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToGen_anonymous.ts ---
// refactor: 5:44-5:45, 14:41-14:42
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

const asyncFunctionDeclaration = async function() {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}

const asyncArrowFunctionExpression = asypipe(n)c () => {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}


=== [R2] Refactor 1: "Rewrite to Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToGen_anonymous.ts ---
// refactor: 5:44-5:45, 14:41-14:42
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

const asyncFunctionDeclaration = async function() {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}

const asyncArrowFunctionExpression = () => Effect.gen(function* () {
    const response = yield* Effect.promise(() => fetch("test"));
    if (response.ok) {
        const y = yield* Effect.promise(() => response.json());
        return y;
    }
    return null;
});


=== [R2] Refactor 2: "Rewrite to Effect.gen with failures" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToGen_anonymous.ts ---
// refactor: 5:44-5:45, 14:41-14:42
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

const asyncFunctionDeclaration = async function() {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}

class Error1 extends Data.TaggedError("Error1")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

class Error2 extends Data.TaggedError("Error2")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

const asyncArrowFunctionExpression = () => Effect.gen(function* () {
    const response = yield* Effect.tryPromise({ try: () => fetch("test"), catch: cause => new Error1({ cause }) });
    if (response.ok) {
        const y = yield* Effect.tryPromise({ try: () => response.json(), catch: cause => new Error2({ cause }) });
        return y;
    }
    return null;
});


=== [R2] Refactor 3: "Rewrite to Effect.fn" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToGen_anonymous.ts ---
// refactor: 5:44-5:45, 14:41-14:42
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

const asyncFunctionDeclaration = async function() {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}

const asyncArrowFunctionExpression = Effect.fn("asyncArrowFunctionExpression")(function* () {
    const response = yield* Effect.promise(() => fetch("test"));
    if (response.ok) {
        const y = yield* Effect.promise(() => response.json());
        return y;
    }
    return null;
});


=== [R2] Refactor 4: "Rewrite to Effect.fn with failures" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToGen_anonymous.ts ---
// refactor: 5:44-5:45, 14:41-14:42
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

const asyncFunctionDeclaration = async function() {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}

class Error1 extends Data.TaggedError("Error1")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

class Error2 extends Data.TaggedError("Error2")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

const asyncArrowFunctionExpression = Effect.fn("asyncArrowFunctionExpression")(function* () {
    const response = yield* Effect.tryPromise({ try: () => fetch("test"), catch: cause => new Error1({ cause }) });
    if (response.ok) {
        const y = yield* Effect.tryPromise({ try: () => response.json(), catch: cause => new Error2({ cause }) });
        return y;
    }
    return null;
});


=== [R2] Refactor 5: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToGen_anonymous.ts ---
// refactor: 5:44-5:45, 14:41-14:42
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

const asyncFunctionDeclaration = async function() {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}

const asyncArrowFunctionExpression = async (): Promise<any> => {
  const response = await fetch("test")
  if (response.ok) {
    const y = await response.json()
    return y
  }
  return null
}
